base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of moldorm_segment — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Moldorm — segmented worm enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Moldorm — segmented worm enemy; 4-frame body-wave of each segment; projectile-like hitbox per segment
